metadata.name: ecommerce-price-scraper
metadata.summary: A package for scraping product prices from Bukalapak, Lazada, and your own custom e-commerce website.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.check_chrome_installed
documentation: Check if Google Chrome is installed on the system.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.setup_driver
documentation: Setup the ChromeDriver with WebDriver Manager.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.get_bukalapak_product_prices
documentation: Scrape product prices from Bukalapak for a given search query.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.get_lazada_product_prices
documentation: Scrape product prices from Lazada for a given search query.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.lazada_search
documentation: A wrapper function for getting product prices by search query.
Search wrapper function for easier usage

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.bukalapak_search
documentation: A wrapper function for getting product prices by search query.

functions.name: ecommerce-price-scraper.scraper.search
documentation: A wrapper function for getting product prices by search query and platform.
